title: Hopo Better Underwater Ruins
description: Explore new ocean ruins to your world
body: ![Alt text](https://i.imgur.com/t9wdjgA.png) # Hopo Better Underwater Ruins "Cities, Ruins, Fossils, Archaeology and more!" # [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/hopo-better-underwater-ruins?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hopo-better-underwater-ruins) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/949138580415062017?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord)](https://discord.gg/CZQthZJjPc) **🔎 Get ready to explore the oceans, this time there is so much to see, loot, surprises, mobs, structures and archeology, be sure to go prepare!** 🧭 Find the cities in the deepest part of the ocean, and explore all the different types of rooms with different types of drowneds. 🌊 Oceans are more interesting, with lots of new small ruins and even fossils, good luck exploring all of them, it's gonna be a challenge! Get ready ![Alt text](https://i.imgur.com/xtNJCT8.png) ![Alt text](https://i.imgur.com/WcCdBUb.png) ![Alt text](https://i.imgur.com/theTCWH.png) ![Alt text](https://i.imgur.com/CvoQVv8.png) ![Alt text](https://i.imgur.com/8ZlGBHE.png) ![Alt text](https://i.imgur.com/Oi4LX7H.png) ### If you wanna start an adventure, use the code 'HOPONO' at checkout for 25% off your first month! ❤️ ### https://bisecthosting.com/hopono [![Discord](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_64h.png)](https://discord.gg/CZQthZJjPc) [![CurseForge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_64h.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hopo-better-underwater-ruins) [](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hopo-better-underwater-ruins) [](https://ko-fi.com/hoponopono) ![Alt text](https://imgur.com/lNhcvC4.png)
